action.reasoning: Observation: New best test AUC 0.7574 (val peak 0.7586@ep11) with embed-DKT (e=256/h=768/d=0.5); clear post-peak overfitting, ES at 26, iter~60s with ~15min left. Analysis: Larger embed helps representations (val improving), but gen gap persists; current train.py display truncated (save dict incomplete) risks future predict breakage. Embedded LSTM core is strong. Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean/complete (full hparam ckpt save, no deprecation, grad clip, robust ES/scheduler, jsonl-only logging, arg parsing, exact inference match); tune to e=320/h=896/d=0.55/lr=1.2e-4/wd=1e-4/bs=32/epochs=55/es_pat=14/sch_pat=4 for richer reps + capacity + finer updates to raise val peak and close gen gap. Train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
